name: How much money can I get for losing fingers in a work machine accident?

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for losing fingers in a work machine accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: $50k-$200k+ via workers comp; depends on disability/wages.
acceptedAnswer.description: Settlements average $50k-$200k+ depending on injury severity, lost wages, future care; workers' comp pays 2/3 wages + medical.[1][3] Value factors: Age, job, permanent disability rating.[4] Key factors: Finger amputation often 10-30% impairment; pain/suffering extra if suing manufacturer.[6] Use comp calculator or attorney estimate. Negotiate settlement carefully.

description: $50k-$200k+ via workers comp; depends on disability/wages.
